ogTitle: Two Mile Flat vs Tyagarah: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Two Mile Flat and Tyagarah.
heading: Two Mile Flat vs Tyagarah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Two Mile Flat, New South Wales and Tyagarah, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tyagarah has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Two Mile Flat (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Two Mile Flat or Tyagarah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Two Mile Flat has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Tyagarah scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Two Mile Flat scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Tyagarah scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Two Mile Flat or Tyagarah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tyagarah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
